title: Supply Chain Manager - Volkswagen India Logistics - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Volkswagen India Logistics - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Volkswagen India Logistics family as a Supply Chain Manager in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Volkswagen India Logistics:
Volkswagen India Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Volkswagen India Logistics!
